name: ai-video-studio-generators
description: The studio's generator tools: cinematic shot-pack/prompt authoring, the Hyperframes ($0 Three.js) renderer, local voiceover, and the QA attention gate. Bring your own LLM via llm.cjs (LLM_BASE_URL/LLM_API_KEY/LLM_MODEL, OPENAI_API_KEY, or Ollama), or run with no key for ready-to-paste prompts.
